recommendations.title: Wolfwalkers

recommendations.title: The Secret of Kells
recommendations.overview: Adventure awaits 12 year old Brendan who must fight Vikings and a serpent god to find a crystal and complete the legendary Book of Kells. In order to finish Brother Aiden's book, Brendan must overcome his deepest fears on a secret quest that will tak

recommendations.title: Kahlil Gibran's The Prophet
recommendations.overview: Exiled artist and poet Mustafa embarks on a journey home with his housekeeper and her daughter; together the trio must evade the authorities who fear that the truth in Mustafa's words will incite rebellion.
recommendations.director: Roger Allers, Bill Plympton, Mohammad Saeed Harib, Tomm Moore, Nina Paley, Joan C. Gratz, Michał Socha, Joann Sfar, Paul Brizzi, Gaëtan Brizzi

recommendations.title: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story
recommendations.overview: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story is a movie based on the life story of world-renowned neurosurgeon Ben Carson from 1961 to 1987.

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: Sleeping Beauty
recommendations.overview: Cursed to die by the evil fairy Maleficent when she was a baby, Princess Aurora is sent into hiding under protection from three good fairies. As she grows up far away, Maleficent becomes increasingly determined to seal the princess's fate.

recommendations.title: The Pinchcliffe Grand Prix
recommendations.overview: 100 miles north, a bit east and up, is Pinchcliffe, the home of bicycle repairman Reodor Felgen and his two assistants, Solan Gundersen and Ludvig. Sponsored by oil sheik Ben Redic Fy Fazan, they build the car "Il Tempo Gigante" to race against Reodo

recommendations.title: Children of the Sea

recommendations.title: The Little Prince

recommendations.title: Alesha Popovich and Tugarin the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Alesha Popovich has to catch Tugarin Zmey and bring back the stolen money with the help of a talking Horse (which talks all the time and has an opinion on everything), a wise granny, a donkey and a beauty Lyubava.
